since_last: 65% of 101 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +8.12%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 65% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.89% · BTC +1.68% · Gold +1.82% · Nasdaq100 +1.93%. 65% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +8.12%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +8.12%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -1.77%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +24.63%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +24.63%, CBRS +17.83%, SKHY +14.91%, MU +13.19%, TER +12.03%. Laggards: OKTA -4.99%, WDAY -4.90%, MDB -4.33%, CHKP -3.88%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +3.84% at $124.45
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +3.84% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
